description: Style Note These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt. Product Details Round toe, white shoe with lace up styling upper Synthetic upper with reinforced overlay at the heel collar Padded collar and tongue with a removable sockliner PU midsole TPU outsole with horizontal deep grooves Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush Do not store in direct sunlight
